calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2015 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-02-2015 Continued To Dec-30-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Nov-17-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: A. Mok, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Robert F. Cohen, Esq., appearing specially for Plaintiff, Sunstate Equipment Co., LLC, a limited liability company.
Order Waiving Live Testimony on file.
No appearance by defaulted defendant Mission Constructors, Inc., a corporation,
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-20 dismissed without prejudice.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $31,234.56
Pre-Judgment Interest: $8,841.52
Attorney's Fees: $2,825.00
Costs: $535.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $43,436.08

Judgment signed in open court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2015 Continued To Nov-18-15 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
